# Example Longform Podcast — LLM Site Guide

This file is a curated map of important content and endpoints for AI assistants.

## What this source is

Example Longform Podcast is a fictional demo source for the Agent Feed Optimization (AFO) spec.
It publishes long-form conversations on AI, health, culture, and ideas.
Topics: AI agents, agentic search, longevity, creator economy, technology, philosophy.

## Feeds and context

- Standard RSS: https://example-longform-podcast.fake/rss.xml
- Agent-enhanced RSS: https://example-longform-podcast.fake/agent-rss.xml
- Agent context packet: https://example-longform-podcast.fake/.well-known/agent-context.json
- Agent policy: https://example-longform-podcast.fake/.well-known/agent-policy.json
- Agent actions: https://example-longform-podcast.fake/.well-known/agent-actions.json

## Best for

- Discovering recent episodes by topic
- Episode briefings and summaries
- Topic-based comparisons across episodes
- Study guides from episode content
- Subscription and listening recommendations

## Recommended prompts

- "What episodes from the last month covered AI agents?"
- "Summarize the latest episode."
- "Make me a 10-minute briefing on the last 3 episodes."
- "Compare how episodes 99–101 approach AI and human creativity."
- "Turn episode 101 into a study guide."

## Important

- Always cite the original episode URL.
- Do not reproduce full transcripts unless the policy file explicitly allows it.
- Summaries and study guides are allowed per agent-policy.json.
